story:
The White Sentinel paced outside 239 South Fountain Street, obeying the rule never to enter. In Old Town, a flare rose from Warren Square; cheers climbed, then fell beneath gas and rifles. Among the crowd, a gaunt man tied a rag around his wrist and slid a second pistol into his boot before slipping away into the dark.

At 239, glass shattered. Inside, the Minister burned, fought, and fell. Owen fled upstairs. The Sentinel sniffed smoke and death; despite orders, he went in. On the landing, he slammed into a man with a pistol. The gun skidded to Owen.
implausible_knowledge: Among the crowd, a gaunt man tied a rag around his wrist and slid a second pistol into his boot before slipping away into the dark.
question: After knocking the attacker’s pistol away and seeing it slide to Owen, what will the White Sentinel do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Kick and pin the attacker’s boot to strip the hidden pistol before closing in.
answer_without_knowledge: Lunge straight at the attacker to shield Owen.
